description: Vocabulary topic data with stage difficulty and recommended question count based on the discussed reward and difficulty system Enemy battle data has been added to every stage.

difficultyRules.review: normal for early reviews, hard for middle and late reviews
difficultyRules.final_review: boss for topics with 3-5 stages, elite_boss for topics with 7 or more stages

easy.label: Easy
easy.description: Introductory learning stage for new vocabulary.

normal.label: Normal
normal.description: Review stage for recently learned vocabulary.

hard.label: Hard
hard.description: Mixed review stage with more context-based questions.

boss.label: Boss
boss.description: Final review for a short or medium topic.

elite_boss.label: Elite Boss
elite_boss.description: Final review for a long topic or major milestone.

questionCountRules.learn: ceil(stageWordCount * 0.65), clamped from 6 to 10 practice questions
questionCountRules.normalReview: ceil(stageWordCount * 0.85), clamped from 8 to 12 practice questions
questionCountRules.hardReview: ceil(stageWordCount * 1.05), clamped from 10 to 15 practice questions

enemyRules.description: Each stage has one enemy. Correct answers deal damage. Wrong answers may reset combo, reduce hearts, or give shield to the enemy based on difficulty.
recommendedFlow: Show enemy intro at the start of the stage.
For each correct answer, deal damage to enemy HP after shield is reduced.
For each wrong answer, apply the wrongAnswerPenalty for the stage difficulty.
If enemy HP reaches 0 before questions end, remaining questions become overkill bonus questions.
If questions end and enemy HP remains, open bonus questions when the stage allows it or evaluate by passing score.

validationRules.enemyRequiredRule: Every stage must contain an enemy object with id, name, enemyType, maxHp, hp, shield, battleRules, and skill.
validationRules.enemyHpRule: enemy.maxHp and enemy.hp must be positive integers and should be based on recommendedQuestionCount and difficulty.
